title: Looking for (Genomic) Needles in a Haystack: Sparsity-Driven Search for Identifying Correlated Genetic Mutations in Cancer
venue: IEEE International Parallel & Distributed Processing Symposium (IPDPS)
authors: R Prabhu, E Vatai, B Moussad, E Jeannot, R Anandakrishnan, W Feng, M Wahib
summary: Uses sparsity-driven pruned depth-first search to make multi-hit cancer mutation search feasible at large scale.
abstract: Uses sparsity-driven pruned depth-first search to make multi-hit cancer mutation search feasible at large scale.

title: ResearchBot: Bridging the Gap between Academic Research and Practical Programming Communities
venue: IEEE/ACM International Workshop on Bots in Software Engineering (BotSE)
authors: S Farzanepour, S Rajeev, H Liang, R Prabhu, C Brown
summary: Builds a modular bot that retrieves and summarizes academic papers to answer practical software-engineering questions.
abstract: Builds a modular bot that retrieves and summarizes academic papers to answer practical software-engineering questions.

title: Balancing Performance and Productivity: A Comparative Study of Apache Arrow vs. MPI
venue: 2025 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), 1–7
summary: Compares MPI/C, MPI/Python, and Python-based Apache Arrow implementations to study performance, scalability, and developer productivity tradeoffs.
abstract: Compares MPI/C, MPI/Python, and Python-based Apache Arrow implementations to study performance, scalability, and developer productivity tradeoffs.

title: Improved 2-D Chest CT Image Enhancement with Multi-Level VGG Loss
venue: IEEE Transactions on Radiation and Plasma Medical Sciences 9(3), 304–312
authors: A Chaturvedi, R Prabhu, M Yadav, WC Feng, G Cao
summary: Uses multi-level VGG loss to improve low-dose chest CT image enhancement for clearer diagnostic images.
abstract: Uses multi-level VGG loss to improve low-dose chest CT image enhancement for clearer diagnostic images.

title: On the Scalability of Computing Genomic Diversity Using SparkLeBLAST: A Feasibility Study
venue: 2024 IEEE High Performance Extreme Computing Conference (HPEC), 1–8
authors: R Prabhu, B Moussad, K Youssef, E Vatai, W Feng
summary: Models and evaluates SparkLeBLAST scalability for COVID-19 genomic diversity analysis on Fugaku-scale systems.
abstract: Models and evaluates SparkLeBLAST scalability for COVID-19 genomic diversity analysis on Fugaku-scale systems.

title: Explainable Interactive Projections for Image Data
authors: H Han, R Faust, BFK Norambuena, R Prabhu, T Smith, S Li, C North
summary: Combines interactive dimensionality reduction with visual explanations so users can reshape and understand image projections.
abstract: Combines interactive dimensionality reduction with visual explanations so users can reshape and understand image projections.

title: Interactive Deep Learning for Sorting Plant Images by Visual Phenotypes
authors: H Han, R Prabhu, T Smith, K Dhakal, X Wei, S Li, C North
summary: Uses Andromeda to let domain experts sort plant images by visual phenotype through interactive deep learning.
abstract: Uses Andromeda to let domain experts sort plant images by visual phenotype through interactive deep learning.
